title: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor vs Moosend. See pricing, features, ratings, and find which email marketing tool fits your business needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison
intro: Both Campaign Monitor and Moosend are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management for agencies, while Moosend offers an affordable freemium model ideal for startups and small businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your email marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple client brands or accounts simultaneously
Advanced journey design and customer lifecycle automation are priorities
You need professional-grade transactional email capabilities
choose_b_if: You're a startup or small business with a limited budget
You want to start for free with up to 1,000 subscribers
You need unlimited emails and landing page builder functionality

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Moosend?
faq.a: Neither is universally "better"—it depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands with advanced automation, while Moosend offers superior value for small businesses through its free tier and unlimited emails. Moosend also has higher customer satisfaction ratings on both G2 and Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper. It offers a free plan for up to 1,000 subscribers, then starts at $9/month, whereas Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month. For small businesses, Moosend's freemium model provides excellent value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support standard email list exports and data migrations. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign data, though you may need to manually reconfigure automations and templates in Campaign Monitor. Check both platforms' migration documentation for specific details.
